stdout:
## Issue success criteria - ‚ùå **Not met**: `Fp

` field axioms are not fully proved; `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/FpField.lean` still contains `sorry` in core deliverables (`FpVal.instCommRing` L70-72, `fromZMod` L83-85, `fpValRingEquiv` L92-97, `FpVal.instField` L103-105) - ‚ùå **Not met**: Montgomery core lemma remains unproved; `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean` has `p_inv_value_spec` ending in `sorry` (L105-108), and downstream theorems (`redc_value_spec`, `from_mont_value`, `to_mont_value`, `montgomery_roundtrip`) depend on it - ‚öÝÔ∏è `proofs/Gf2Core.lean` correctly imports the requested modules (L7-8), but this is wiring only, not completion of proofs ## No technical debt - ‚ùå Introduced/remaining proof debt: explicit unresolved placeholders in production proof artifacts (`sorry`) and comments acknowledging unfinished proof work (‚Äúsingle sorry‚Äù in `MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean` L98-103) ## Separation of concerns - ‚úÖ No evidence of `gf2-core` depending on `gf2-coding`; changes are confined to Lean proof files and proof entry imports ## Functional paradigm and performance - ‚úÖ No Rust kernel/high-level algorithm changes; no regression found against functional/performance guidance in the code touched ## Correctness - ‚ùå Core correctness obligations are not fully discharged because REDC correctness hinges on unproven `p_inv_value_spec` (`MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean` L157 onward depends on L105-108 `sorry`) - ‚ùå ‚ÄúFp is a verified field implementation‚Äù is not established while `CommRing`/`Field` constructions are placeholders in `FpField.lean` ## Testing - ‚ùå Requirement ‚Äúno test or lint failures‚Äù is unsatisfied for this review: issue gates in provided context remain pending (`cargo-ci`, `lake-build`), and local execution of `cargo`/`lake` was not possible in this environment (permission denied), so no passing CI-equivalent evidence for this change set - ‚ùå Proof-completion quality check fails independently due unresolved `sorry` in required proof files ## Unsafe isolation - ‚úÖ No new Rust `unsafe` introduced outside `gf2-kernels-simd`; reviewed deltas are Lean-side ## Documentation - ‚ùå Documentation/proof narrative overstates completion: file headers describe proved flagship results while required lemmas/instances remain `sorry`, creating mismatch between claims and verification state ## Prior review feedback - ‚úÖ `run_history` is empty, so no prior unresolved review comments to re-check ## Jit issue dependencies - ‚úÖ Dependency `886af072` is marked `done`; prerequisite status is satisfied VERDICT: FAIL --- Gate result: FAILED
